creator: yamagi@yamagi.org
text:
Created attachment 161036
svn patch do version 0.6.7

Hello,
the attached patch updates audio/ncmpcpp to 0.6.7. This is just another small bugfix release without any major changes. Changes to the application are:

* Fetching artist info from last.fm was fixed.
* A typo in the example configuration file was fixed.
* Fetching lyrics from lyricwiki.com was fixed.

Changes to to the port are:

* Bump version number to 0.6.7

This updated was tested with Poudriere on FreeBSD/amd64 10.2, 10.1, 9.3 and even 8.4.
